name: Shrimp Dunk
recipeIngredient: 1 celery stalk, top and leaves removed, sliced
1 lb very large shelled shrimp, raw
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except shrimp in a large saucepan. Cover; heat to boiling.
2. Boil 10 minutes.
3. Add shrimp. Cover and boil 5 minutes, or just until shrimp turn pink. Remove from heat; chill in cooking liquid.
4. Serve cold with dunking bowls of cold beer. Serve as an appetizer or as a summertime main entree. Makes 25 to 30 shrimp
